theme: Modern Minimal with Theme Park Accents (Awwwards-level, Playful & Vibrant)

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-black tracking-tight leading-[1.1]

layout.spacing: Generous paddings (p-8 to p-24). Allow content to breathe.
layout.radius: Use rounded-3xl or rounded-full for a playful theme park aesthetic.
layout.grids: Bento-style asymmetrical grids for gallery and features.
layout.containers: Max-width 7xl for main content area, with full-bleed sections for Hero and Marquee.

choreography.hero_text: Masked line-by-line reveal using Framer Motion (initial { y: '100%', opacity: 0 }, animate { y: 0, opacity: 1 }, transition { staggerChildren }).
choreography.hero_images: Subtle floating animation (y: [-10, 10] infinite alternate) to create a parallax/magical effect.
choreography.scroll_reveals: Fade up and scale in for sections as they enter viewport.
choreography.marquee: Infinite horizontal translation for the editorial marquee.

Header.style: Sticky top-0, glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md), border-b border-gray-200/50, z-50.
Header.content: Bilingual Logo (7 अजूबे PARK), Navigation links, 'Book Tickets' primary CTA button.

Hero.style: Full viewport height, background_light. Massive kinetic typography.
Hero.content: Hindi headline: 'दुनिया के प्रसिद्ध अजूबे अब आपके शहर मुरादाबाद में!'. English subtitle. CTA button that scrolls to booking form. Clipped floating images of the 7 Wonders (circles, pills, arch shapes) surrounding the text.

EditorialMarquee.content: Continuous scrolling text: THE 7 WONDERS OF THE WORLD • 7 अजूबे पार्क • NOW IN MORADABAD •

Manifesto.content: Park story and M.D.A. initiative details.

WondersGallery.content: Showcase of the 7 wonders using provided real product photography.

BookingSection.style: Split layout: Form on left, Sticky Live Summary on right. bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl p-8.
BookingSection.content: Date Picker, Adult/Child counters. Dynamic Pricing: Mon-Fri ₹50/person, Sat-Sun ₹100/person. Kids under 3 always FREE. 'Proceed to Pay' triggers Success Modal.

PricingTable.style: Clean, scannable cards side-by-side (Weekday vs Weekend).
PricingTable.content: Highlight the weekend card slightly (scale up, border brand_teal).

SuccessModal.content: Dummy QR code, Success message, Ticket summary.

Footer.content: Contact Info: +91 98765 43210 | info@7ajoobeparkmoradabad.com. Address: RMMV+MF3, New Moradabad, Chaudharpur, Moradabad, Uttar Pradesh 244102. Google Maps placeholder (gray block with map icon).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images or colored backgrounds passes WCAG AA.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (inputs, buttons, counters, totals) MUST have data-testid attributes.
accessibility.fonts: Use appropriate font families for Hindi vs English text blocks to ensure legibility.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind with the exact custom colors provided.
Import the Google Fonts in index.css.
Use framer-motion heavily in the Hero section to create the 'Awwwards-level' kinetic reveal of the Hindi text.
The 7 Wonders images in the Hero should be clipped into shapes (arches, rounded pills) using Tailwind's border-radius or clip-path, and animated to float slowly.
Implement the dynamic pricing logic correctly in React: `const isWeekend = date.getDay() === 0 || date.getDay() === 6; const price = isWeekend ? 100 : 50;`
Only use Lucide React for icons. No emojis for UI icons.
Keep the overall vibe vibrant, professional, and slightly magical.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do NOT center align the app container (No .App { text-align: center; }).
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and soft box-shadows.
Apply specific transitions to interactive elements, never 'transition: all'.
Add micro-animations to all buttons (hover scale up slightly, active scale down).
Never use generic AI emojis for icons; always use lucide-react.
